name: Crayola Broad Line Markers (12pk), Assorted Bulk Markers for Kids, Arts & Crafts Supplies for Coloring Books, Construction Paper, Ages 3+
bullets: CRAYOLA MARKERS: Experience the joy of creativity with this classic set of Crayola Markers, an ideal choice for group activities in school classrooms or at home.

BULK TEACHER SUPPLIES: Stock up on teacher classroom must haves, including Crayola bulk packs of crayons, markers, and more. Great for kindergarten, preschool, elementary school, art rooms, and group projects.
MUST HAVE CLASSROOM ESSENTIALS: Essential for students and teachers alike, these markers boast a durable tip that ensures bold, broad lines for a long-lasting writing experience.
CRAYOLA MARKER COLORS: Explore an array of Crayola Marker Colors, including Orange, Yellow, Brown, Violet (Purple), Red, Blue, Black, Pink, Gray, and Green.
GIANT MARKER SET: This comprehensive marker set features 12 individually boxed sets, each containing 10 Crayola Markers, perfect for large groups or classrooms.
LONG-LASTING: Crafted for longevity, these school supply essentials are filled with durable and long-lasting ink to ensure many hours of creative fun.
description: Get ready for the new school year with this classic set of Crayola Markers. These aren’t just your everyday coloring supplies, they’re a catalyst for creativity and learning. This bulk pack isn’t just a collection of markers, it’s a vibrant spectrum of colors ready to bring school projects to life. Each marker is designed with a durable, long-lasting tip, perfect for creating bold, broad lines that make artwork pop off the page. Whether it’s for an art project, a school assignment, or even holiday decorations, these markers are up to the task. And with 12 separately boxed sets of 10 Crayola Ma

reviews.name: Elizabeth Roof
reviews.title: Preschoolers approved
reviews.body: My preschoolers at church were thrilled with all the new markers!  Great deal for Sunday school or regular classrooms

reviews.name: Tami Stone
reviews.title: Great for kids
reviews.body: Exactly what I wanted. Beautiful colors and long lasting

reviews.name: George
reviews.title: Great school project, Supply
reviews.body: I purchased these for a school project. The kids loved them of course we gave them to them after they used them for the project. I still have kids asking when we will do a project like that again so that they can get the big Crayola.
